description: A customer calls to make a one-time payment on their homeowner's insurance policy with a credit card.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their policy to find the amount due.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the customer's policy and the outstanding balance.

nodes.task_description: Securely collect the customer's credit card information.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately and securely captures the payment details.

nodes.task_description: Process the payment and provide a confirmation number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully processes the payment and provides the correct confirmation number to the customer.
